description_long: This is a tall, amber-colored glass bottle with a long neck and a bulbous base, reminiscent of a champagne or sparkling wine bottle. The surface features intricate, etched floral and decorative patterns, giving it an ornate and premium appearance. A gold-colored tag is attached around the neck, adding a touch of elegance and suggesting it may be a special edition or gift item. The front of the bottle displays a prominent label with stylized text and a crest-like emblem, while the back and sides are more focused on the decorative etching. The bottle is sealed with a cap that appears to be covered, possibly with foil or wax, typical of celebratory beverages. The overall finish is glossy, reflecting light and enhancing the luxurious feel.
description: An ornate, amber glass bottle with etched floral patterns, a gold tag, and a glossy finish, resembling a premium champagne or sparkling wine bottle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label, crest emblem, and gold tag hanging from the neck.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the decorative etching and the gold tag's position near the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuation of the etched floral design with no visible label.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the intricate etching and the gold tag partially visible from the side.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with stylized text 'HOXXOH' and a crest emblem in gold and black; gold tag around the neck with additional branding.
